title: Fixed Altar SMP Legendries Arc 5 Resource pack
description: The Altar SMP Legendries Arc 5 resource pack from Doomwens AltarSMP plugin is broken so this is it fixed. Currently, windweaver, echo and hyperion all have the same texture.
body:
Fixed resource pack for:
https://builtbybit.com/resources/altar-smp-legendries-arc-5.89897

As the windweaver, echo & hyperion are all the same texture this fixes it. It just does that nothing else but requires the builtbybit plugin.
